name: Fantasy Zoo
short_description: Fantasy Zoo is a thematic zoo builder where you build zoo for fantasy animals in a fantasy world. Fill the zoo with animals and monsters from mythology and fantasy pop culture. Manage and build the zoo with help of magic.
detailed_description:
What if a powerful wizard wanted to build a zoo for all kinds of different fantasy animals? Build your own zoo for many unique creatures. Instead of normal animals like elephants or lions, fill the zoo with monsters like dragons and griffins.

Animals with quirks

30 Different animals from mythology and pop culture fantasy. Build a good enclosure for each animal according to their requirements. Animals can have different quirks which can make it hard to keep them safely, such as dragon’s fiery breath or basilisk’s petrifying gaze.

Magic

Use thematic tools to manage and build the zoo. Move things by teleporting and stop dangerous animals from rampaging with an ice spell. Magical crystals can be used to prevent animals from escaping and have other utility effects.

Sandbox or simple progression

Play as you like using a simple progression system with a research tree and challenges to give you ideas on what to build next, or just play in a sandbox with everything unlocked from start.

Light management

Keep your guests happy for gold income, choose from different workers ,and think about costs before getting new animals. Alternatively, just start with a large sum of gold and build freely.

Simple building

Old school style grid system where you can freely build your zoo.

Mayhem

Simple combat mechanic makes the escaping animals dangerous. Stop escaping animals with spells and the zoo staff, or let them rampage and enjoy the mayhem.
